claim_scope.claim_limit: SOTA-grade downside-adjusted hypothetical backtested performance under the included downside_performance_v1 benchmark only
non_claims: No return guarantee or future performance claim.
No broker integration, order routing, or execution-readiness claim.
No universal market, strategy, or external-framework dominance claim.
No claim outside the included downside_performance_v1 benchmark suite.

publication_requirement: performance_claim_publishable plus strategy freeze, data lineage, baseline fairness, statistical confidence, and forward paper-trading protocol evidence
